fields.TargetCanvas: The target canvas to nest as
fields._renderOffset: The render offset reference from the target canvas to be applied to the new nested canvas
fields._maskDepth: The mask depth reference from the target canvas to be applied to the new nested canvas

usage: This component is used mainly for consistency with other canvas components, no matter where in the world hierarchy. It does not need to be on the same canvas or panel to work.

notes.title: Related Components
notes.text: This needs a Canvas component to work.
